### Hey 👋 I am Joseph Petersen aka. jetersen

[![x profile](https://img.shields.io/badge/-@jetersen-000000?style=flat-square&logo=x&logoColor=ffffff)](https://x.com/jetersen)
[![linkedin profile](https://img.shields.io/badge/-jetersen-0e76a8?style=flat-square&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,)](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jetersen/)

[![github profile](https://img.shields.io/badge/-@jetersen-%23181717?style=flat-square&logo=github)](https://github.com/jetersen)

I love to work on open source ❤️ and at the moment I work for [MovieStarPlanet](https://corporate.moviestarplanet.com/) as a Senior DevOps Engineer. 👨‍🏭\
Where I do my best to promote open source and everything as code! 👏\
Feel free to check out my projects and my [GitHub sponsor profile](https://github.com/sponsors/jetersen) 🙋‍♂️
